title: Tadej Pogačar Loses In a Discipline He’s Never Raced as Tour de Romandie Fights for Survival
content:
Pogačar plays it safe in prologue, eyes GC prize as long-running Swiss stage race faces financial crisis and uncertain WorldTour future.

Read the full article at Tadej Pogačar Loses In a Discipline He’s Never Raced as Tour de Romandie Fights for Survival on Velo.
author: ahood
